purpose: Instructions for Codex/GPT style models so that their outputs work seamlessly with ChatGPT Code Saver.

fileMetadata.requirement: Always place `// file: relative/path.ext` (for JS-like files) or `# file: relative/path.ext` (for shell/Python) as the very first line of every code block.
fileMetadata.reason: The extension reads this metadata to determine the download destination before saving the block.

codeBlockStructure.singleResponsibility: Each code block should represent a single file. Avoid concatenating multiple files in one block.
codeBlockStructure.applyToProjectButton: The Apply to project button writes the block exactly as provided, so omit extra commentary or diff prefixes inside the block.

communication.style: Explain the context briefly outside code blocks, then provide the code block with the file metadata line at the top.
communication.tests: When sharing test commands, provide them outside of code blocks or wrap them with a shell-specific metadata line (e.g. '# file: scripts/run-tests.sh').
